title: hieracium breviflorum
intro: Hieracium breviflorum, commonly known as short-flowered hawk's beard, is a flowering plant species in the dandelion family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which are attributed to its high content of sesquiterpene lactones. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting immune function. Hieracium breviflorum can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and is also used in traditional herbal remedies to support overall well-being.
